parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_saved_opportunities (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, agency TEXT, dept TEXT, need_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0, urgency TEXT DEFAULT 'MEDIUM', primary_fit TEXT, secondary_fit TEXT, so_what TEXT, solicitation TEXT, source TEXT, value TEXT, capture_action TEXT, ai_rank INTEGER DEFAULT 0, ai_rationale TEXT, user_starred BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, user_notes TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'TRACKING', saved_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); SELECT id, title, agency, dept, need_score, urgency, primary_fit, so_what, solicitation, ai_rank, user_starred, user_notes, status, saved_at FROM gda_saved_opportunities ORDER BY user_starred DESC, ai_rank DESC, need_score DESC;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ opportunities: $('Execute Query').all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i.id), count: $('Execute Query').all().filter(i => i.json.id).length, fetched_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
